$comment: Fleet CLI exit code taxonomy — maps LibreSpot domain outcomes onto Intune/SCCM/PDQ/WinRM return-code categories.
description: LibreSpot fleet CLI exit code taxonomy for Intune, SCCM, PDQ, and WinRM admin tools.

exitCodes.name: UnhandledFailure
exitCodes.description: Unhandled or unknown failure. Indicates an unexpected error that did not map to a more specific exit code.

exitCodes.name: ValidationError
exitCodes.description: Validation or usage error. The command was invoked with invalid arguments, a malformed answer file, or an unrecognized option.

exitCodes.name: NotInstalled
exitCodes.description: Spotify, Spicetify, or a required component is not installed. Detection found no target to operate on.

exitCodes.name: DriftDetected
exitCodes.description: Drift or noncompliance detected. The installation exists but does not match the desired state (e.g., version mismatch, missing Marketplace, stale watcher).

exitCodes.name: RepairNeeded
exitCodes.description: Repair needed. The installation is partially broken and requires a repair pass before it can be considered compliant.

exitCodes.name: BlockedByUserState
exitCodes.description: Blocked by Spotify running or another user-state condition. The operation cannot proceed until the user closes Spotify or the blocking condition is resolved.

exitCodes.name: NetworkFailure
exitCodes.description: Network or rate-limit failure. A required download, API call, or connectivity check failed due to a transient network issue or upstream rate limiting.

exitCodes.name: TrustFailure
exitCodes.description: Hash or signature trust failure. A downloaded artifact did not match its expected SHA256 checksum or Authenticode signature, indicating potential tampering or a corrupted download.

exitCodes.name: InsufficientPermissions
exitCodes.description: Insufficient permissions. The operation requires elevated privileges or access rights that the current execution context does not have.

exitCodes.name: Canceled
exitCodes.description: Operation canceled. The user or calling process explicitly canceled the operation before it completed.

exitCodes.name: AnotherInstallInProgress
exitCodes.description: Another install is in progress. A concurrent installation (MSI mutex, LibreSpot run lock, or Windows Installer session) is blocking this operation.

exitCodes.name: SuccessRebootRecommended
exitCodes.description: Success with reboot recommended. The operation completed successfully but a reboot is recommended for all changes to take full effect.

exitCodes.name: RebootInitiated
exitCodes.description: Reboot initiated. The operation completed and LibreSpot actually initiated a system reboot. Only returned when LibreSpot itself triggers the restart.
